nodes.label: AAOI
nodes.thesis: Volatile small-cap with in-house InP fab; 2027 projection trading on FinTwit conviction.

nodes.label: AAPL
nodes.thesis: Strong franchise + memory-dislocation advantage; bear = AI catch-up + price elasticity.

nodes.label: ADI
nodes.thesis: Highest-quality large-cap analog; industrial recovery + datacenter-power (Empower); crowded/premium.

nodes.label: ADVANTEST
nodes.thesis: #1 ATE in a duopoly with Teradyne; ~80% of SoC test is HPC/AI and effectively sole SoC tester at the GPU/CoWoS leaders — levered to test intensity, not wafer st

nodes.label: AEIS
nodes.thesis: RF/DC power for semicap (~30% share) + AI-DC power shelves; EPS power to high-teens; debate = DCC lumpiness + 800V positioning.

nodes.label: AGX
nodes.thesis: EPC pure-play on the firm-power super-cycle (backlog ~79% gas); nil coverage on disk.

nodes.label: AIXA
nodes.thesis: Near-monopoly compound-semi MOCVD (~100% InP, >85% GaN); AI-optical inflection (Jefferies Buy €73); thin internal coverage.

nodes.label: AKAM
nodes.thesis: Akamai — legacy CDN delivery (declining) pivoting to Security + Cloud Compute; $1.8B 7-yr frontier-model infra deal re-accelerates growth to double-digits 2027

nodes.label: ALAB
nodes.thesis: Scale-up connectivity (PCIe/CXL retimers + Scorpio fabric); >$1k content/accelerator; concentration + rich multiple.

nodes.label: AMAT
nodes.thesis: Broadest-line front-end WFE; share-gainer into a $200B/$250B '27-'28 WFE cycle; bear = memory beta + crowded positioning.

nodes.label: AMD
nodes.thesis: AI-infra long with a server-CPU leg; risk concentrated in MI450 execution.

nodes.label: AMZN
nodes.thesis: AWS re-acceleration (+28%) + in-house silicon (Trainium); debate = $200B capex/ROIC.

nodes.label: ANET
nodes.thesis: Best-positioned merchant AI-Ethernet name; risk = 2H26 backlog drawdown + rich multiple.

nodes.label: ANTHROPIC
nodes.thesis: Private frontier lab (Claude); enterprise/coding leadership + Amazon/Google compute; ~$40B+ ARR. No public financials.

nodes.label: AOSL
nodes.thesis: Power MOSFET/IC small-cap in the 800VDC Rubin-rack basket; design-win unconfirmed, negative EPS. Thin coverage.

nodes.label: APH
nodes.thesis: AI-interconnect compounder; 800V busbar/connector content + CommScope optical; debate = copper terminal value.

nodes.label: APP
nodes.thesis: AXON AI ad engine; eCommerce inflection + fading META threat the bull, drawn-out eComm ramp the bear (DB Buy $660 / GS Neutral $585).

nodes.label: ARM
nodes.thesis: Upstream IP toll on every SoC; ARMv9/CSS royalty + >$100B server-CPU TAM; own-silicon pivot the risk. 20-F filer.

nodes.label: ASML
nodes.thesis: Supply-chain chokepoint (EUV near-monopoly); Street "behind the curve" on 2027/28 vs a 2028 DRAM air-pocket.

nodes.label: AVGO
nodes.thesis: #1 custom-ASIC/TPU partner; binary setup on the ">$100B" FY27 guide vs $250-300B FY28 (JPM).

nodes.label: AXTI
nodes.thesis: Most direct InP-substrate bottleneck play (~80% non-China w/ Sumitomo); bull = optical supply oligopoly, bear = China-permit gate + trading-vehicle beta.

nodes.label: BE
nodes.thesis: On-site SOFC fuel cells for DC power (Nebius/Google); bull = grid bottleneck, bear = Redburn Sell + Delta/Ceres competition.

nodes.label: BESI
nodes.thesis: Hybrid-bonding / TCB leader for HBM and 2.5D/3D stacking (AI ~50% of 2025 orders, GM 63-66%); AMAT hardware partner on the high-end HB roadmap.

nodes.label: BKNG
nodes.thesis: World's #1 OTA; binary debate on agentic LLMs (TAM expander vs disintermediation).

nodes.label: CDNS
nodes.thesis: EDA duopoly (with SNPS) + hardware emulation; ~80% recurring, AI-design tailwind; bear = China/export-control exposure + rich multiple.

nodes.label: CEG
nodes.thesis: Owns what the AI-power cycle is short: 24/7 carbon-free nuclear; risk is PPA timing.

nodes.label: CEREBRAS
nodes.thesis: Wafer-scale fast-inference vs NVDA; OpenAI take-or-pay; UAE concentration. Recent IPO, no public consensus.

nodes.label: CIEN
nodes.thesis: Optical/DCI leader; demand outruns supply, debate purely valuation (~85x NTM).

nodes.label: COHR
nodes.thesis: InP chokepoint in AI interconnect; NVIDIA stake + CPO deal; bear is relative vs LITE.

nodes.label: CRDO
nodes.thesis: AI-connectivity pure-play — active-copper (AEC) + SerDes/optical DSP; ~68% GM, hyperscaler-concentrated.

nodes.label: CRM
nodes.thesis: Agentforce $0→$1B+ ARR is the AI-monetization test case; bear = ~10-13% growth + SaaS-seat-reset (BofA UW $160).

nodes.label: CRWD
nodes.thesis: Falcon consolidation flywheel + Charlotte AI; net-new ARR re-accel; valuation/crowding + 2024-outage tail the bear.

nodes.label: CRWV
nodes.thesis: Highest-visibility GPU neocloud ($99B backlog) but ~$25B high-coupon debt + customer concentration.

nodes.label: CSCO
nodes.thesis: Incumbent re-rating to AI-infra (orders +35%); bear prefers ANET, flags pull-forward.

nodes.label: DELL
nodes.thesis: AI-server integration winner ($53B backlog, $60B FY27 guide); bear = thin AI-server margins + pull-forward.

nodes.label: DISCO
nodes.thesis: Near-monopoly precision dicing/grinding/polishing (~70-80% share of HBM wafer-thinning tools) + consumables; sixth straight record year on AI GPU/HBM. ¥, FYE Ma

nodes.label: ETN
nodes.thesis: "AI-factory power" electrical name (switchgear/busway); RMT sharpens portfolio; bull = capex/800V, bear = Q1 margin trim.

nodes.label: FLEX
nodes.thesis: EMS re-rating to AI-DC power (Anord Mardix) + JetCool cooling; CPI spin Q1-CY27; margin-dilutive near-term.

nodes.label: FSLY
nodes.thesis: Fastly — edge-delivery turnaround diversifying into Security + Compute (Sec +47%); first profitable year; bear = customer concentration (TikTok/top-10) + Cloudf

nodes.label: GEV
nodes.thesis: Cleanest AI-power earnings-revisions story (orders +71%); bear = order peak + Wind.

nodes.label: GLW
nodes.thesis: Re-rate to AI-infra (Optical +36%, Meta/Nvidia LTAs); bear = valuation + CPO payoff 2028+.

nodes.label: GOOG
nodes.thesis: Full-stack compounder (Search +19%, Cloud +63%); debate is valuation, not fundamentals.

nodes.label: HPE
nodes.thesis: Multi-segment beat + Juniper synergies; durability debate (GS bull $79 vs MS/Bernstein EW).

nodes.label: IFX
nodes.thesis: #1 power/auto-semi IDM; cyclical recovery + 800V AI-datacenter-power ramp (NVIDIA anchor); bear = DC-power share loss.

nodes.label: INTC
nodes.thesis: Binary IDM turnaround; 18A yielding, but the equity is a call option on the first big external foundry customer.

nodes.label: KIOXIA
nodes.thesis: Cleanest listed NAND/SSD-cycle proxy; no DRAM/HBM offset on the downturn. ¥, no SEC, IPO'd 2024.

nodes.label: KLAC
nodes.thesis: Process-control near-monopoly (~7x peers); only semicap to guide CY27 WFE > CY26; back-half-of-cycle revision story.

nodes.label: LITE
nodes.thesis: US photonics pure-play (rev +90%); demand isn't the question, supply/execution is.

nodes.label: LRCX
nodes.thesis: Etch/deposition WFE — completes the AMAT/KLAC/LRCX trio; most memory-capex-levered (NAND/HBM).

nodes.label: MCHP
nodes.thesis: Textbook deep-cyclical MCU/analog recovery; GM 54%→62%; supply-gated, already re-rated.

nodes.label: MEDIATEK
nodes.thesis: World's largest mobile-SoC vendor pivoting into a data-center custom-ASIC house (Google TPU v8t/v9/v10 roadmap); JPM sees DC ~30% of rev 2027 → ~60% 2028; GS PT

nodes.label: META
nodes.thesis: Fastest grower in Mag7 ex-GPU; bear = capital intensity and negative incremental ROIC.

nodes.label: MP
nodes.thesis: Only scaled ex-China rare-earth/magnet play; de-China "follow the gigawatt" bull vs trade-deal/execution risk (BofA Buy). Thin coverage.

nodes.label: MRVL
nodes.thesis: #2 merchant custom-ASIC (Trainium/Maia) + optical DSP; debate = hyperscaler concentration + 1.6T share.

nodes.label: MSFT
nodes.thesis: AI ARR >$37B/+123%; swing is capex (CY27 ~$276B) vs Azure revenue + OpenAI concentration.

nodes.label: MU
nodes.thesis: Pure-play on AI memory intensity (HBM sold-out CY26); debate = peak earnings vs run-rate.

nodes.label: NBIS
nodes.thesis: Highest-octane listed neocloud (ARR→$7-9B, NVDA stake); capex burn + circular-financing scrutiny.

nodes.label: NET
nodes.thesis: Cloudflare — developer/edge platform + Zero Trust security, AI-inference-at-edge (Workers AI); +34% rev, "agentic-AI-first" ~20% RIF; bull = platform/RPO compou

nodes.label: NFLX
nodes.thesis: Clean organic algorithm (12-14% rev, 31.5% margin); near-term setup is a catalyst vacuum.

nodes.label: NOW
nodes.thesis: Beat-and-raise (cRPO +21%) + agentic pivot to consumption; on-disk transcripts are paraphrased (fidelity).

nodes.label: NVDA
nodes.thesis: Full-stack AI-factory platform at +85% rev; debate is demand sustainability vs ASIC erosion.

nodes.label: NVT
nodes.thesis: nVent — AI-DC power + liquid cooling (DC ~$1B, backlog $2.6B); NVIDIA CDU partner; order lumpiness.

nodes.label: NVTS
nodes.thesis: Navitas — GaN/SiC; binary on the NVIDIA 800V design win (rev 2027); cash burn + small-cap volatility.

nodes.label: NXPI
nodes.thesis: Highest auto-beta analog/embedded; content-per-vehicle + datacenter doubling; concentration the risk.

nodes.label: ON
nodes.thesis: Bottoming auto/SiC power IDM + AI-DC-power (800V) kicker; share not TAM (Citi Neutral vs TXN).

nodes.label: OPENAI
nodes.thesis: Private frontier lab (ChatGPT/GPT); scale + distribution vs cash burn + sub-50% share; Microsoft-anchored. No public financials.

nodes.label: ORCL
nodes.thesis: Turned into an AI-infra hyperscaler (RPO $638B/+363%); bear = dot-com-peak capex/sales + dilution.

nodes.label: PANW
nodes.thesis: Cybersecurity platformization land-grab + agentic SecOps; debate = organic vs M&A-flattered NGS ARR.

nodes.label: PLTR
nodes.thesis: Ontology/"action engine" moat (claimed 5-yr); momentum strong but valuation split (UBS Buy $200 vs DB Hold $200).

nodes.label: POET
nodes.thesis: Pre-revenue EOI/CPO optionality de-risked by $50M Lumilens order; bear = valuation vs FOCI + CPO timeline slip. Thin coverage.

nodes.label: POWI
nodes.thesis: Power-conversion ICs; FinTwit NVDA 800VDC "main stages" partner, but no capital catalyst + consumer drag. Thin coverage.

nodes.label: PWR
nodes.thesis: Labor pick-and-shovel on the grid/data-center super-cycle (backlog $48.5B).

nodes.label: QCOM
nodes.thesis: High-FCF handset franchise eroding (Apple modem); re-rating hinges on auto/IoT/PC diversification.

nodes.label: RDDT
nodes.thesis: Dual engine: ads + AI data-licensing; binary on Google AI-Overviews referral-traffic cannibalization.

nodes.label: SAMSUNG
nodes.thesis: Cheapest way to own the memory super-cycle; HBM4 catch-up vs SK Hynix + foundry optionality. ₩, no SEC.

nodes.label: SANM
nodes.thesis: EMS re-rating via ZT Systems AMD-rack integration (FY27 $16B+, ~2x FY25); bear = ZT margin/pull-forward (JPM/BofA/SIG all Neutral).

nodes.label: SHOP
nodes.thesis: Commerce OS at 30%+ GMV; agentic-commerce binary (TAM-expander vs LLM-storefront disintermediation).

nodes.label: SKHYNIX
nodes.thesis: #1 HBM, NVDA's primary supplier, sold out through 2026; bear = HBM4 commoditization. ₩, no SEC.

nodes.label: SMCI
nodes.thesis: Fastest NVIDIA rack integrator + DLC leader; thin assembly margin + governance overhang (Hold).

nodes.label: SMIC
nodes.thesis: China's national-champion mature-node foundry; self-sufficiency proxy vs mature-node price-war + EUV/export-control ceiling on its DUV 7nm push.

nodes.label: SNDK
nodes.thesis: Post-spin pure-play NAND on AI storage; price-driven blowout + $42B LTA backlog vs blowoff-top risk.

nodes.label: SNPS
nodes.thesis: #1 EDA franchise + Design IP, now multiphysics via the ~$35B Ansys deal; AI-design secular grower; bear = Ansys integration/leverage + China.

nodes.label: SPCX
nodes.thesis: IPO'd Jun-2026 (~$75bn, largest ever); Starlink + Launch + AI (ex-xAI: Grok/X/COLOSSUS ~1GW, ~325k GPUs). FY25 rev $17.2bn, net loss ~$(4.9)bn; Musk ~82% vote.

nodes.label: SPOT
nodes.thesis: High-quality audio compounder; debate = AI-music monetization (Remix) vs <2% rev 2030.

nodes.label: STX
nodes.thesis: HAMR/Mozaic front-runner in a supply-constrained nearline cycle; pricing escalators into CY27/28.

nodes.label: TEL
nodes.thesis: TE Connectivity — connector power/signal AI-DC content (AI rev →~$2.4bn FY26); auto-mix the drag.

nodes.label: TER
nodes.thesis: Cleanest back-end proxy for AI test intensity (~70% AI); bear = ~2-customer concentration + H1-weighted book.

nodes.label: TLN
nodes.thesis: PJM merchant IPP (Susquehanna nuclear + AWS PPA); risk = concentration + co-location regulation.

nodes.label: TM
nodes.thesis: HEV volume leader generating cash; margin compressed 3 years by tariffs/FX; thin coverage.

nodes.label: TOKYOELEC
nodes.thesis: Broadest-line Japanese WFE (coater/developer ~91% share, dielectric etch >50%); cleanest Japan-listed proxy for leading-edge WFE + HBM packaging. ¥, FYE March.

nodes.label: TSEM
nodes.thesis: Specialty foundry re-rating on SiPho/SiGe optical; $1.3B 2027 SiPho commit (NVDA-anchored per FinTwit); bear = ramp/concentration. SIG Positive $330.

nodes.label: TSLA
nodes.thesis: Rotating from EV volume to autonomy/robotics re-rate (FSD, Optimus, Terafab); MS EW $415, JPM just to Neutral.

nodes.label: TSM
nodes.thesis: Sole-source leading-edge foundry (~70% share); pricing headroom vs overseas-fab dilution.

nodes.label: TXN
nodes.thesis: Crowded analog long; 300mm capex→FCF inflection + 800V DC-power share; valuation the bear (GS Sell).

nodes.label: UBER
nodes.thesis: Winner-take-most demand aggregator (~$10B FCF); everything hinges on the AV binary.

nodes.label: VECO
nodes.thesis: Specialty process equipment (LSA / ion-beam / MBE / MOCVD); now an Axcelis all-stock merger-arb / ACLS proxy.

nodes.label: VEEV
nodes.thesis: Life-sciences cloud; Vault CRM migration vs AI-disclosure overhang until Q4 Investor Day (MS EW $215).

nodes.label: VRT
nodes.thesis: Vertiv — cleanest AI-DC power+cooling proxy; co-designs NVIDIA 800VDC; $15B backlog; order opacity.

nodes.label: VST
nodes.thesis: Largest US merchant power turning into an AI-power play; debate is pace, not direction.

nodes.label: WDC
nodes.thesis: Pure-HDD post-SanDisk-spin; nearline exabyte growth + HAMR; the "1B" to Seagate's "1A".

nodes.label: WMB
nodes.thesis: Gas-midstream compounder (Transco + Power Innovation); debate = valuation + PI earnings quality.

nodes.label: WOLF
nodes.thesis: Wolfspeed — post-Ch11 SiC; 800V datacenter call-option but negative GM + restructuring overhang.

nodes.label: asic-vs-gpu-share
nodes.title: Custom-ASIC vs merchant-GPU share of AI accelerators
nodes.canonical: Near-term unit share inflects to ASICs (JPM: 42% 2026E -> 53% 2027E, units) while long-term dollar/unit share settles ~65-70% GPU (BofA AI 2030, UBS durable 70/30). These are horizons, not contradictions — the debate is whether the 2027 unit inflection sticks or plateaus.

nodes.label: wfe-tam
nodes.title: WFE market size CY26 / CY27 / CY28
nodes.canonical: CY26 ~$140-160B (all sources agree). CY27: house $180-215B vs MS ~$191B vs UBS $200B. CY28 is the genuine conflict: house top end $260B vs UBS $250B vs MS-implied ~$230-240B; skeptic ceiling 'never $300B' (ex-Samsung foundry EVP). Swing variable = memory-capex intensity + EUV availability post-2027 + first NAND greenfield (CY28).

nodes.label: euv-fab-intensity
nodes.title: EUV tools per fab & leading-edge capex intensity (per 10kwpm)
nodes.canonical: N2 logic (Bristlemoon, Jun-2026): ~11 EUV tools per 25kwpm fab and ~US$4.7B TOTAL fab capex per 10kwpm, built on real EUV throughput ~1/3 of nameplate (NXE:3800E 220->165 wph @40mJ dose x 45% uptime -> 34% OEE -> 2,430 wpm/tool) and 25kwpm as the modern module size (no longer ~40kwpm); capex stack: tool $240M -> EUV 80% of litho -> litho 40% of WFE -> WFE 70% of fab total. Cross-check (former Sams

nodes.label: hyperscaler-capex
nodes.title: Hyperscaler / AI-datacenter capex CY25 / CY26 / CY27
nodes.canonical: Top-4: ~$410B 2025A -> ~$700-725B 2026E (+~75%) -> ~$1.1T 2027E (JPM AI Capex 2.0). Five-name consensus: ~$700B 2026 / ~$900B+ 2027. Buy-side 2027 bogey ~$1.2T ('could be 1.3-1.4', Jefferies). Constraint is power/physical buildout, not demand.

nodes.label: ai-dc-power-gw
nodes.title: AI datacenter power (GW) — facility GW vs IT-load GW vs 800V-debate GW
nodes.canonical: Facility: ~14-16 GW built 2026 / ~20 GW 2027 vs ~40-45 GW proposed (Jefferies satellite tracking, 50% haircut); ~138 GW capacity through 2030 (JPM). IT-load: ~300 GW by 2030 (+25% CAGR, JPM/Omdia) or ~240-280 GW global (JPM First Principles). 800V debate: Citi models 9 GW -> 21 GW 2025-30 — a SUBSET, not total deployment.

nodes.label: rev-per-gw
nodes.title: AI compute revenue / rental rate per GW
nodes.canonical: Rental/revenue per GW of compute: Trainium <$10B/GW (Anthropic/OpenAI); merchant GPU ~$12-13B/GW (neocloud & AWS, pre-2H26 shortage); premium GPU ~$25B/GW (~$25M/MW/yr, SpaceX–Google deal). MS pegs 1P merchant TPU at ~$20B rev/GW (20% GM base). Colocation POWER-ONLY rent: ~$60/kW-month historically -> ~$120-160 typical now, up to ~$200 (weak-credit tenant + good DC), as low as ~$80-100 (India / mi

nodes.label: hbm-cycle
nodes.title: HBM — capacity, pricing, allocation, sold-out claims
nodes.canonical: Sold out CY26 incl. HBM4 (Micron Q1 FY26). Capacity ~473k wspm end-26E -> ~668k end-27E (SemiAnalysis). Pricing: NVDA HBM ~$17-18/GB 2026 -> $30-32/GB 2027, +70-80% (Redburn); blended ASP +~30% (JPM/Micron). Live tension: general-server DRAM overtook HBM as allocation priority #1 (Redburn/TrendForce) yet HBM pricing still marches higher. 2027 supply revised 60B -> 50B Gb-equiv on allocation, not d

nodes.label: nvda-units-gw
nodes.title: NVDA GPU units / GW shipped per year
nodes.canonical: GPU units: 6.2M 2025 -> 8.9M 2026E (+39%) -> 9.9M 2027E (JPM); Fubon '10M+ in 2027' consistent with JPM's 9.9M 2027E. Racks: 54.5k-62k NVL72 2027F (Nomura). Capstone GW frame: ~16 GW/yr sold 2026 -> ~25 GW 2027 (house, NVDA page 2026-06-17) — the bottoms-up cross-check vs JPM units. [Year labels corrected 2026-07-06 — a prior version showed 6.2M as 2026, shifted one year vs the JPM source quoted i

nodes.label: cowos-allocation
nodes.title: CoWoS capacity and NVDA allocation share
nodes.canonical: NVDA ~50-55% of TSMC CoWoS 2027 (Fubon ~50%+; Nomura <55% vs NVDA's targeted ~60% — i.e. target likely missed on TPU squeeze). Within Google TPU: AVGO ~66-68% / MediaTek ~32-34% (Nomura).

nodes.label: ai-tam-2030
nodes.title: AI TAM by 2030
nodes.canonical: BofA ~$1.7T CY30 AI-DC-systems TAM (accelerators ~$1.2T, networking ~$316B, optical ~$88B, HBM $168B). Jensen's '$3-4T end-of-decade AI infra' is a BROADER scope (adds power/grid/software) — not a conflict with BofA.

nodes.label: dram-pricing-2026
nodes.title: Conventional DRAM pricing cadence Q3/Q4 2026
nodes.canonical: TrendForce REVISED (2026-06-30, supersedes 06-23): +15-20% Q3 / +3-8% Q4 — vs experts +20-25% Q3 (Redburn/Sherman/Edison) and market chatter +30-40%. Direction agreed; magnitude is the debate.
